title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 369.104 - Publication of financial statement
text:
369.104.  Publication of financial statement. — Every association shall publish annually, in accordance with regulations promulgated by the director of the division of finance, in a newspaper of general circulation in the county in which its home office is located, and shall deliver to each member of a mutual association and to each stockholder of a capital stock association upon application therefor, a statement of its financial condition in the form prescribed by the director of the division of finance.
(L. 1971 S.B. 3 § 20, A.L. 1978 S.B. 795, A.L. 1982 S.B. 464, A.L. 1989 S.B. 40, A.L. 1994 H.B. 1165) 
Effective 7-06-94
